hero.title: Preparing Students for Real Career Pathways — Not Just Placements
hero.subtitle: Different disciplines lead to different industry expectations and emerging opportunities. Explore how Futureminds maps each domain from curriculum to evolving careers.

domains.name: Engineering & Technology
domains.desc: From core engineering to emerging deep-tech, we map curriculum to the competencies industry now expects.

domains.name: Management & Commerce
domains.desc: Preparing students for analytical, strategic and entrepreneurial roles in a data-driven economy.

domains.name: Health Sciences
domains.desc: OET and CEFR-aligned communication readiness for clinical and global healthcare pathways.

domains.name: Biotechnology & Life Sciences
domains.desc: Bridging laboratory expertise with applied, industry-relevant and translational career skills.

domains.name: Electronics & Cyber Security
domains.desc: Future-ready skills for an automation and security-driven technology landscape.

domains.name: Geography & Applied Social Sciences
domains.desc: Contextual employability for geography, social science and community-facing professions.

domains.name: Industrial Chemistry & Applied Sciences
domains.desc: Applied sciences aligned to manufacturing and process industries.

domains.name: Teacher & Higher Education
domains.desc: Faculty capability and future-of-education readiness for the next generation of educators.
